text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 223 

SRGCL_PRCDR_DT_CNT 

LABEL: Dates associated with surgical procedures included in stay 

DESCRIPTION: The count of the number of dates associated with the surgical procedures included in the stay. 

SHORT NAME: PRCDTCNT 

LONG NAME: SRGCL_PRCDR_DT_CNT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: 0–25 

COMMENT: This field is derived by counting the surgical procedures dates that are reported
